form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (17.75) when fourth over 300m at this track in a Grade 4/5. Goes very well from the draw boasting four victories and four places from 14 starts. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th over 300m at this track beaten 12 lengths (18.23) behind Done By Noon in a Grade 5 on March 28. Has clocked an excellent 17.19 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.

form.formComment: Fast starter. Latest effort finished last on March 18 over 300m at this track behind Bugle Girl beaten 6 lengths (18.27) in a Grade 5. Some good form is emerging from that last run. Expected to prove hard to beat.
